title: M3-03a: Implement server-side rate limiting (60 msg/min per session)
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiter tracks messages per session with timestamps
Limits: 60 messages per minute per session
Returns 429 status with message 'Rate limit exceeded. Please wait.' when exceeded
Rate limit resets after 1 minute of no messages
Uses in-memory Map or Redis for tracking
deliverables: New file: src/rate-limiter.ts with RateLimiter class
Modified: src/web/routes/sessions.ts to integrate rate limiting
